change: Add a decode-only Q4T16 selected dual GEMV variant that fuses split-kernel-equivalent BF16 round-trip SiLU*up into the gate/up accumulator output, removing the separate selected expert SiLU launch for rows=1 decode while keeping rows>1 bulk prefill on the split path.

hardware.gpu: local RX 7900 XTX / gfx1100 run environment (W7900 not rerun)

correctness_gate.command: HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_GEMV_DECODE=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_WMMA_PREFILL=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_p9_e2e_correctness.py --fixture tests/fixtures/gguf/qwen36_35b_a3b_q4km_p9_e2e.json --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/p9_d4_q4t16_silu_decode_only_e2e.json

benchmark.command: HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_GEMV_DECODE=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_WMMA_PREFILL=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_m --prompt-length 512 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 1 --warmup-runs 1 --measured-runs 3 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --graph-replay-decode --graph-steps-per-replay 1 --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/p9_d4_q4t16_silu_decode_only_512x128_bench.json

tests: PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m py_compile hipengine/kernels/hip_gfx1100/quant/gguf_t16_selected_gemv.py hipengine/runtime/qwen35_gguf_runner.py && PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m pytest tests/test_gguf_t16_selected_gemv_decode.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_compact_moe_gemv_routing.py -q --tb=short # 72 passed
notes: Rows>1 bulk prefill tried the same fusion locally (512/128 median prefill/decode 496.370/85.909 tok/s) but was left on the split pair+SiLU path because accumulator-side exp/rounding did not pay for the removed SiLU launch at prefill shapes.
Small positive decode-only launch reduction; #51/#52/#26 remain open because median decode is still below 95 tok/s.
